{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alin's device
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] gave [[Simon]] a device that looks like a little acorn trapped in a delicate golden birdcage.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
